title: Spectre's Assorted Dragons
description: Various dragons for your Isle of Berk experience!
body:
Adds several more dragons to play with.
Currently includes: Zipplestrykes, a hybrid of a Triple Stryke and a Hideous Zippleback - 5 variants. Grapple Grounders, the original version from the 2010 HTTYD for the Wii - 7 variants. Messed-up Evil Cats, based on the Lost Master as seen in NINJAGO Legends: Monstrosity and LEGO FORTNITE Odyssey - 2 variants.
Planned: Firefang. 
Possibly also an upside-down blimp dragon.

WIKI: [Spectre's Wiki](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1Iyn7aP-vVA9nGxxerItXGOqOYKGO9lRXq-y-rFJUl7w/edit?usp=sharing)

STILL OPEN: Be the first to translate the messages on Terms and Conditions, and you can win your very own variant of one of these dragons! There are 5 in total, some of which are rather famous phrases relating to Minecraft. I won't tell you how many, though. Contact slugfox2304 on Discord if you think you've done it.

CREDITS

Spectre's Assorted Dragons is made entirely by me, with only advice coming from outside sources. Our license is and shall remain ARR, to protect these assets of which we have use and distribution permissions but not ownership. Most dragon models use IoB models as a base due to hardcoded rigging dependencies making it impractical to scratch model. Spectre's Assorted Dragons does not claim to have made these models, they were created by the IoB team and now belong to NBD. We are permitted use of these IoB base assets provided we remain as an addon to IoB and/or NBD and do not claim to have made them. These credits may change as necessary. They will always be correct to the most recent release of this mod. We are also not affiliated with the NINJAGO or FORTNITE franchises.
